creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Michael. If the issue can be isolated to be a freebsd or freebsd port specific issue, then here is great, otherwise upstream is more appropriate.

I would obtain isolation advice from KDE and FreeBSD support channels (IRC, Forums, etc).

Our IRC channels are available  here: 

https://wiki.freebsd.org/IRC/Channels

We have a KDE/desktop specific channel at #freebsd-desktop

Feel free to re-open this issue rather than create a new one if it turns out to be a freebsd/port issue
